programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: The Fugitive S01E24
programme.desc: The Fugitive S01E24

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: When a nosecones capsule fails to eject after landing in the ocean Mike attempts to locate it and rescue the scientist trapped inside

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A female diving student plots revenge after Mike kicks her out of his diving class

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Helping the 918th to use weather patterns to bomb an attractive meteorologist captain becomes rebellious when her weather plane is shot down

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A swindler Jack loves money and twins One day he meets rich twins that show interest in him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An aging puppeteer suspects his much younger wife has a lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A record store clerk with psychotic tendencies is granted unspeakable powers by a magical pendant which he abuses to fulfill his dream of meeting a beautiful rock star

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers grandpa offers pointers on drilling a platoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke tries to sweeten the McCoy bankroll - by selling barn perfume

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Everyone in the family wants to buy a TV with the 15 in the cookie jar Well almost everyone - Grampa wants a power saw instead

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A British scientist is hiding at Maxs apartment

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Maxs archenemy Siegfried wants to defect

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When BJ rescues a young lady from an assailant it hits Captain Cain where he lives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A 3-Sister Singing Act is stranded on a deserted island and McHale and The 73 Crew have an ulterior motive when they volunteer for the rescue mission But the girls having had such experiences in the past are wise to their plan

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While out on a recon mission McHale and the 73 Crew discover a deserted plantation which they turn into a party house where they can enjoy themselves when not on duty But their activities draw the attention of both the US Navy and the Japanese

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules 205
programme.desc: Hercules 205

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The shuttle Liam and Zoor are in crashes over wilderness but survive in safety bubbles The people they meet live off the earth and know nothing of the Taelons However Zoor is injured and missing a Synod meeting on the mother ship

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Carla Jeffries uses Arcanes own scheming ways against him to take over his complex the doctor and Swamp Thing must work together to save both the swamp and Arcanes life

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The latest extra-terrestials to be rescued by the Moon Alpha Base crew are Pasc and his young son Etrec They are from the usually peaceful planet of Archaron and they claim that they are victims of a rebellion engineered by Pascs wife Lyra However Helena discovers that they have both been infected with a virus which makes them considerably less friendly and more deadly than their initial claim

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.desc: Chey 402

programme.desc: Terrorists take several people hostage including Keller Stone has to deal with not only the terrorists but a journalist whos sympathetic to their cause and a vengeful father whose daughter was killed

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon does her job all too well when the latest mission requires her to feign love for a vain assassin Meanwhile Briggs and Barney work to get an over-the-hill terrorist out of the way

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: Abdallah Ibrahim v. Kevin Walker

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Dr Frost and his nephew invent a device that can alter the Earths weather and Cy-Kill snatches it to plunge the Earth into a permanent ice age

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Pride intercepts a message to Saw Boss declaring the Planet Kyros deadly to Monster Minds A weapon there turns everything to crystal Jayce leads everyone to the planet to find this weapon; but upon landing he discovers it is a trap

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.desc: VENOM use a cyclonic disruptor to interfere with the operating systems of MASKs vehichles

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: When the lost city of Kongoland arises after 1000 years the N-Team goes to investigate When they arrive an ancient treasure possesses Princess Lana with the spirit of Konga the leader of the Konkas

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom
